'''waduyu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:yocco|yocco]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-d-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yocco|yocco]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| waduyu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:wædiyith|wædiyith]] || [[word:wædiyij|wædiyij]] || [[word:wædiyish|wædiyish]] || [[word:wædiyi|wædiyi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:waduduyuth|waduduyuth]] || [[word:waduduyuj|waduduyuj]] || [[word:waduduyush|waduduyush]] || [[word:waduduyu|waduduyu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:waduyuth|waduyuth]] || [[word:waduyuj|waduyuj]] || [[word:waduyush|waduyush]] || [[word:waduyu|waduyu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:wadufyuth|wadufyuth]] || [[word:wadufyuj|wadufyuj]] || [[word:wadufyush|wadufyush]] || [[word:wadufyuf|wadufyuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:waduyuthu|waduyuthu]] || [[word:waduyuju|waduyuju]] || [[word:waduyushu|waduyushu]] || [[word:waduyuku|waduyuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:waduyuth|waduyuth]] || [[word:waduyuj|waduyuj]] || [[word:waduyush|waduyush]] || [[word:waduyu|waduyu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:waduyuthul|waduyuthul]] || [[word:waduyujul|waduyujul]] || [[word:waduyushul|waduyushul]] || [[word:waduyukul|waduyukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:waduyuthuthu|waduyuthuthu]] || [[word:waduyujuju|waduyujuju]] || [[word:waduyushushu|waduyushushu]] || [[word:waduyuku|waduyuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:waduyuthun|waduyuthun]] || [[word:waduyujun|waduyujun]] || [[word:waduyushun|waduyushun]] || [[word:waduyukun|waduyukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:waduyuthuoro|waduyuthuoro]] || [[word:waduyujuoro|waduyujuoro]] || [[word:waduyushuoro|waduyushuoro]] || [[word:waduyukuoro|waduyukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|3a936e1}}
